zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Berkeley於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston33歲，母親Margaret Mortimer22歲。他和Margaret Chandos至少有1個女兒。他去世於1350年享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Berkeley于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston33岁，母亲Margaret Mortimer22岁。他和Margaret Chandos至少有1个女儿。他去世于1350年享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Berkeley was born about 1325, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Mortimer, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Margaret Chandos. He died in 1350, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Berkeley est né environ 1325, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mortimer, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margaret Chandos. Il est décédé en 1350, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Berkeley um 1325 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Mortimer 22. Er hatte mit Margaret Chandos mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 26 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley è nato il circa 1325 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mortimer, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margaret Chandos. Morì nel 1350, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeleyが約1325年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Costonは33歳，母Margaret Mortimerは22歳であった。彼はMargaret Chandosとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1350年に26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeley(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mortimer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret Chandos(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mortimer, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Margaret Chandos. Ele faleceu em 1350, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Berkeley родился около 1325 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mortimer, 22. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margaret Chandos. Он умер в 1350 г. в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1325, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Mortimer, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Margaret Chandos. Murió en 1350, a la edad de 26 años.
